current.summary: Capability monitor pipeline design — identified new provider bootstrap as architecturally distinct from change detection

activeWork.description: Designing capability monitor pipeline change detection and provider bootstrap flows
activeWork.progress: Recognized that new provider case (no cached hash, no format doc, no seeder spec baseline) requires separate architectural handling from change detection. Design doc needs new section for bootstrap flow.

recentDecisions: New provider bootstrap is not change detection — it is bootstrapping with no baseline state
Bootstrap case requires distinct pipeline section with no cached hash or prior format doc
nextSteps: Add bootstrap flow section to capability monitor design doc
Define state initialization and format detection for new providers
Clarify relationship between bootstrap and change detection flows

context.notes: User correctly identified missing case in design. New provider addition has no cached state/hash/format doc — this is bootstrap, not change detection. Warrants separate treatment in the design architecture.
